summary: Plan-only classification for five open maintainer-ready PRs. One narrow failing PR has a concrete repair path; one broad PR needs maintainer judgment; the remaining passing PRs should stay open for normal review/preflight rather than cluster action.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #84545 in place on the contributor branch if possible. The change is narrow: make the Google Gemini forward-compat resolver support gemini-3.5-flash without regressing existing Gemini 3/preview model routing, then rerun the provider-model tests and changed-check validation. Preserve @yhakami as the source author.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Clownfish repair for #84545.

This keeps the original contributor path intact where possible and preserves attribution to @yhakami for the gemini-3.5-flash resolver work.

Validation plan:
- pnpm test extensions/google/provider-models.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84545
